mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name, student_no, phone, email, avatar_url, role_id, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, student_no, phone, email, avatar_url, role_id, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE student_no = #{studentNo} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, student_no, phone, email, role_id, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{studentNo}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{roleId}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user u WHERE u.is_deleted = 0
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND u.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, student_no = #{studentNo}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, role_id = #{roleId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE student_no = #{studentNo} AND id != #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, student_no = #{studentNo}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
